titles.title: I Love This Livin' For Him

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I love this livin' for Him I love this calling, this Savior, my friend Looking back to where I've been I love this livin', I love this livin' for Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Since the day that I met Him, Since the brand new start, Since the sweet surrender of my heart, Closer than a brother, our Lord has been to me There will be no other life I would need

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I love this livin' for Him I love this calling, this Savior, my friend Looking back to where I've been I love this livin', I love this livin' I love this livin' for Him

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Nowadays our struggle I have noticed they've been a few But in the midst of trouble His love holds true And the pouch of keys trusting I'll see the light of day, it's all the part of walkin' this gospel way

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I love this livin' for Him I love this calling, this Savior, my friend looking back to where I've been I love this livin', I love this livin' for Him
